arts.ttl: Transfer rumors, news: Liverpool, Man City in race for Frimpong
arts.sum: Liverpool and Manchester City appear set to compete for the signature of Bayer Leverkusen's Jeremie Frimpong, while Manchester United have identified RB Leipzig's David Raum as a potential solution for manager Ruben Amorim at left-back. - Liverpool have identified Bayer Leverkusen right-back Jeremie Frimpong as their No. 1 potential replacement for Trent Alexander-Arnold, according to TeamTalk .

arts.ttl: £80m star was convinced he was set for Liverpool transfer and told Reds player about it
arts.sum: Liverpool reportedly looked close to a summer transfer window move for Newcastle United winger Anthony Gordon, who at one point was convinced he’d be joining. arts.ttl: Eddie Howe reacts to "foolish" move he was keen to avoid for Newcastle United
arts.sum: Howe told Chronicle Live: "The key thing for me is we try our best to keep Callum fit for as long as possible so he can get into his flow and rhythm. Eddie Howe has stated it would have been "foolish" to field Callum Wilson earlier than the 75th minute at Crystal Palace.
